name: Glenwood Town Reach
rationale: Town reach anchored directly to the Glenwood Colorado gauge until more detailed interpolation rules are added
note: Estimated fishing location tied to the Glenwood Colorado gauge.

name: South Canyon Wave
rationale: South Canyon can use between-gauge flow and temperature with slight downstream warming as a first-pass estimate
suitability: Good for a downstream Glenwood/South Canyon reference
note: Estimated fishing location tied to the South Canyon gauge corridor.

name: Lower Roaring Fork Town Reach
rationale: Lower Roaring Fork town reach is close enough to the Glenwood gauge to use direct observed values as the first version
suitability: Good lower Roaring Fork reference spot
note: Estimated fishing location tied to the Glenwood Roaring Fork gauge.
